task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "初始化系统文件对话框"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "弹出文件选择窗口供用户选择音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "检查是否选择了文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "尝试使用pydub读取音频文件以验证可读性"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "提取音频文件的基本信息（路径、时长、采样率、声道数）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "捕获异常并输出错误信息"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "列出可能的错误原因（如文件损坏、解码器缺失等）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "安装依赖库（如pydub和ffmpeg）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "自动下载Whisper语音识别模型"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "加载Whisper模型到内存"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "执行语音识别任务，生成分段文本"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "按时间顺序整理带时间戳的文本"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "保存带时间戳的文本到文件"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "捕获语音识别中的异常"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "调整模型大小以平衡性能与准确度"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "切换模型运行设备（CPU/GPU）"}, {"id": "Node17", "description": "指定语言参数以支持多语言识别"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "initDialog"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "fileSelected"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "validateFile"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "extractInfo"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "catchError"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "listPossibleCauses"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node4", "type": "installDependencies"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "executeTranscription"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "organizeTimedText"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "saveToFile"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node14", "type": "catchException"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node10", "type": "adjustModelSize"}, {"source": "Node16", "target": "Node10", "type": "switchDevice"}, {"source": "Node17", "target": "Node11", "type": "setLanguage"}]}
